content_body:
Beautiful cabin and area! My family has lived in Georgia for 40 years and I have never been this north (they are in Atlanta and Marietta). My husband and my children and me live in Wisconsin and we do love it there. But you have the best of both worlds here in Blue Ridge; woods and warm!

We came with my adult children for a wedding at Aska Farms - beautiful as well. My children would've loved to stay here much longer, but we all have jobs to get home to. They loved everything about the cabin and the area. We may come back sometime in the future, I'm hoping~

Thank you so much for sharing this lovely cabin with us - we enjoyed our time here.

-The Mueller and Jaeger Family
title: We Enjoyed Our Time Here
